jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Torrent Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!
